code_issues.issue: Tests use inline SQL instead of migration system. Lines 65-92 create enrollment_tokens table directly instead of using testutil.RunMigrations or CreateSchema
code_issues.fix: Replace inline table creation (lines 67-92) with call to testutil.CreateSchema(ctx, db.pool) to properly use the migration system

code_issues.issue: Potential nil pointer dereference at line 189: checks `*req.EffectiveTo != ""` before confirming `req.EffectiveTo != nil`
code_issues.fix: Change to `if req.EffectiveTo != nil && *req.EffectiveTo != ""` or validate separately

code_issues.issue: Silent error handling at line 670: table creation error ignored
code_issues.fix: Check and return error from h.db.Exec(ctx, initQuery)

code_issues.issue: Error ignored at line 288: base64 decode error silently discarded
code_issues.fix: Handle error from base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString instead of using _

code_issues.issue: Unused variable at line 606: opacityStr declared but not used
code_issues.fix: Remove unused variable or use it in the ghostscript command

code_issues.issue: Manual PDF generation (lines 644-666) produces minimal invalid PDFs
code_issues.fix: Use proper PDF library like github.com/jung-kurt/gofpdf or github.com/signintech/gopdf

code_issues.issue: URL parsing errors ignored (line ~157). url.Parse errors not checked
code_issues.fix: Handle errors from url.Parse for all service URLs

code_issues.issue: Custom parsePath function (lines 850-867) instead of using path.Split or strings.Split

missing_items: Tests should call testutil.CreateSchema() instead of inline table creation
Migration system in testutil is not actually used by the tests it was meant to fix
No integration test verifying the migration system works end-to-end
blocking_issues: The core requirement to 'fix testutil migration execution' is incomplete - testutil.RunMigrations was implemented but tests bypass it with inline SQL
If migration file 000020_create_enrollment_tokens.up.sql changes, tests will be inconsistent with actual schema
fix_instructions: 1. Modify services/auth-service/repository/enrollment_token_test.go: Remove inline table creation (lines 65-92) and replace with `if err := testutil.CreateSchema(ctx, db.pool); err != nil { t.Fatalf("schema setup: %v", err) }`. 2. Verify tests still pass after using real migrations. 3. Address nil pointer check in cost.go line 189. 4. Add error handling where errors are ignored.
